login.subtitle: Spaced-repetition language learning with FSRS and your own LLM key.

dashboard.generatePrompt: Generate a fresh batch for today.
dashboard.regenerateConfirm:
Regenerate today's {count} words?

Cards you haven't reviewed yet will be discarded. Cards you've already rated stay in your deck.
dashboard.generationTooSlow: Generation is taking longer than expected — check worker logs
dashboard.pickProvider: Pick a preferred LLM provider in Settings first
dashboard.addKey: Add your API key in Settings → API keys
dashboard.caughtUp: 🎉 You're caught up. Want extra practice?

review.comeBack: Come back later for the next wave.

flipCard.flipHint: Tap or press space to flip

settings.title: Settings
settings.modelHint: Leave blank to use the recommended default ({default}).
settings.modelDocsHint: Model names change often — check each provider's docs for current IDs.
settings.upgradeHint: When you change CEFR level, existing cards keep their original example sentences. Click below to regenerate examples for cards you're currently learning at your new level, using your own LLM key.
settings.upgradeQueued: Adjustment queued — feel free to keep using the app, we'll notify you when it's done.
settings.upgradeRunningExternally: An adjustment is already running in another tab.
settings.upgradeSuccess: Examples adjusted — reload a card to see the new sentences.
settings.upgradePartialSummary: Example adjustment done: {upgraded} succeeded, {failed} failed, {skipped} skipped (last error: {error}).
settings.upgradeTooSlow: Adjustment is taking longer than expected — check worker logs
settings.upgradeDisabledNoProvider: Pick a preferred LLM provider and save settings first.
settings.upgradeDisabledNoKey: Add an API key for {provider} on the API keys page first.
settings.upgradeDisabledUnsaved: You have unsaved settings changes — save them before adjusting.
settings.upgradeNeededAfterCefrChange: CEFR level changed — add an LLM provider and key, then return here and click "Adjust examples to current level".

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.intro: Your keys are encrypted at rest with AES-256-GCM. They're used only to generate your daily words and never exposed to the browser.
apiKeys.noProviderYet: You haven't picked a preferred LLM provider yet. Pick one in Settings before daily generation or example adjustments can run.

llmSetup.title: LLM setup required
llmSetup.missingProviderIntro: Daily words are generated by an LLM using your own API key — this keeps the service free to run and lets you control costs. You haven't chosen a provider yet.
llmSetup.grabKey: Grab an API key from any supported provider:
llmSetup.pasteYourKeyHint: (stored encrypted, never shown in the browser).
llmSetup.pickProvider: Pick your preferred provider in Settings
llmSetup.missingKeyIntro: Your preferred provider is {provider}, but you haven't uploaded a key for it yet.

generation.subtext: Asking your LLM for fresh vocab — {seconds}s elapsed.
generation.blockingNav: Generation in progress — please wait until it finishes.
